symptom_description: Scroll compressor making loud unusual metallic rattling and metallic clattering sound (`0.38` in/sec RMS on frame). Compressor drawing `66%` low amps (`45%` FLA). Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit TOWER-302.
root_cause: Scroll tip seal wear (`0.023 inch` gap) and flank wear caused by liquid refrigerant slugging (`84%` floodback) during low-ambient startup without crankcase heater energized.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant circuit B, cut out worn scroll compressor, brazed in exact replacement scroll compressor assembly (`P/N 9822-C`), replaced liquid line drier, evacuated to 400 microns, and weighed in R-410A charge (`59 lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Tandem Scroll Compressor Assembly (15HP), Bi-Flow Filter Drier Core, R-410A Refrigerant (25 lbs)

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `38` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly (`28%` open).
root_cause: Lightning strike induced surge (`460V +/- 2%` peak) destroyed 5V reference circuit on pressure transducer PCB.
action_taken: Installed new 0-500 PSI pressure transducer (`Spec-686`), verified 5VDC reference voltage (`460V +/- 1%`), and confirmed EEV step modulation stabilized.
parts_used: Pressure Transducer (0-500 PSI), 5VDC Regulating Module, Wiring Pigtail

symptom_description: Chiller circuit B unable to build differential pressure (`discharge/suction pressures nearly equal` at `22 PSI`). Scroll compressor running hot (`119`°C).
root_cause: Fatigue fracture (`5.2 inch` crack) of internal Oldham coupling ring inside scroll set due to thousands of thermal/pressure cycles (`20 Hz` short cycles).
action_taken: Replaced failed hermetic scroll compressor unit (`P/N 4916-B`), renewed crankcase heater and contactor (`Spec-705`), flushed piping (`P/N 9778-A`), installed new bi-flow filter drier, and recharged system (`160 lbs`).
parts_used: Hermetic Scroll Compressor 20HP, Crankcase Heater Band 240V, Liquid Line Filter Drier, R-410A Charge (30 lbs)

symptom_description: High superheat reading (`> 98°C` at compressor suction) and low subcooling (`< 2°C`). Chiller running `100%` capacity but leaving water `95`°C high. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on TOWER-302.
root_cause: Pinhole corrosion leak (`0.16 inch` diameter) on evaporator brazed plate heat exchanger refrigerant channel caused by aggressive local humidity (`pH 6.3`).
action_taken: Located pinhole leak at condenser inlet header using nitrogen/hydrogen tracer gas (`43 PSI`), brazed joint, renewed filter drier, and recharged system (`18 lbs`).
parts_used: Bi-Flow Filter Drier, R-410A Top-off Charge (25 lbs), Service Port Caps

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `38` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly (`34%` open).
root_cause: Lightning strike induced surge (`480V +/- 3%` peak) destroyed 5V reference circuit on pressure transducer PCB.
action_taken: Installed new 0-500 PSI pressure transducer (`P/N 2252-B`), verified 5VDC reference voltage (`460V`), and confirmed EEV step modulation stabilized.

symptom_description: Scroll compressor making loud accelerated metallic rattling and buzzing/humming sound (`0.67` in/sec RMS on frame). Compressor drawing `29%` low amps (`45%` FLA).
root_cause: Scroll tip seal wear (`0.013 inch` gap) and flank wear caused by liquid refrigerant slugging (`26%` floodback) during low-ambient startup without crankcase heater energized.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant circuit B, cut out worn scroll compressor, brazed in exact replacement scroll compressor assembly (`Spec-201`), replaced liquid line drier, evacuated to 400 microns, and weighed in R-410A charge (`95 lbs`).

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `22` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly (`31%` open).
root_cause: Thermal cycling (`117`°C swings) fractured the delicate lead wire soldering inside the epoxy-potted temperature probe head (`Spec-717`).
action_taken: Spliced in new liquid line temperature probe (`P/N 3053-A`), sealed connection with marine-grade heat shrink (`P/N 4466-A`), and verified fan staging logic.
parts_used: Liquid Line Temperature Sensor, Marine-Grade Heat Shrink, Zip Ties

symptom_description: Chiller circuit A short cycling (`49 Hz` cycles/hr) on low-pressure switch (`cutout at 36 PSI`). Clear sight glass showing continuous rapid bubbles. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to TOWER-302.
root_cause: Micro-leak (`0.011 inch` pinhole) at copper U-bend braze joint on air-cooled condenser coil due to continuous fan vibration (`0.54` in/sec) and thermal cycling.
action_taken: Performed electronic leak check, located micro-leak at condenser coil U-bend, recovered remaining charge, silver brazed repair (`P/N 4873-C`), evacuated to 350 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-410A (`22 lbs`).
parts_used: R-410A Refrigerant Charge (22 lbs), Liquid Line Filter Drier, Silver Braze Alloy

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `59` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly (`57%` open). Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from TOWER-302.
root_cause: Lightning strike induced surge (`230V` peak) destroyed 5V reference circuit on pressure transducer PCB.
action_taken: Installed new 0-500 PSI pressure transducer (`Spec-716`), verified 5VDC reference voltage (`460V +/- 4%`), and confirmed EEV step modulation stabilized.
parts_used: Pressure Transducer (0-500 PSI), 5VDC Regulating Module, Wiring Pigtail

symptom_description: Scroll compressor amp draw fluctuating erratically (`82` Amps). Chiller failing to pull down process loop temperature (`+92`°C deficit). Unit overdrawing current when TOWER-302 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Prolonged operation with marginal oil return (`< 29%%` level) caused metal-to-metal scoring (`0.07 inch` deep) between orbiting and fixed scroll wraps.
action_taken: Swapped out damaged scroll compressor with factory replacement (`Spec-379`), installed new phase monitor relay (`P/N 1677-B`) to prevent reverse rotation, pulled deep vacuum, and recharged R-410A (`40 lbs`).
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Unit, Phase Monitor Protection Relay, Filter Drier, R-410A Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: High superheat reading (`> 101°C` at compressor suction) and low subcooling (`< 2°C`). Chiller running `100%` capacity but leaving water `90`°C high.
root_cause: Loose flare nut connection (`98 ft-lbs` under-torqued) on sight glass or filter drier fitting allowing slow loss (`-55%` volume) of R-410A/R-407C over past cooling season.
action_taken: Tightened sight glass and filter drier flare nuts (`43 ft-lbs` torque), replaced Schrader valve cores (`Spec-277`), pulled 12-hour deep vacuum, and recharged circuit A with precise weight of R-410A (`147 lbs`).
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Seal Caps (4-Pack), R-410A Refrigerant (18 lbs), Flare Gasket Set

action_taken: Located pinhole leak at condenser inlet header using nitrogen/hydrogen tracer gas (`53 PSI`), brazed joint, renewed filter drier, and recharged system (`167 lbs`).

symptom_description: Chiller circuit B unable to build differential pressure (`discharge/suction pressures nearly equal` at `22 PSI`). Scroll compressor running hot (`100`°C).
root_cause: Liquid wash-out of bearing lubrication (`176 ppm` oil dilution) during extended periods of low superheat (`< 1°C`) destroyed upper orbital bearing.
action_taken: Cut out destroyed tandem scroll pair (`Spec-139`), installed new manifolds and compressors, flushed acid oil with RX-11 (`P/N 8104-A`), and verified superheat (`99°C`).
parts_used: Tandem Scroll Compressor Set, RX-11 Flush Solvent (2 Cans), Suction Filter Core, R-410A (45 lbs)

symptom_description: Low refrigerant charge alarm active on scroll chiller controller. Tech noted noticeable oil residue on condenser header braze joint (`0.015 gap`). Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on TOWER-302.
root_cause: Micro-leak (`0.017 inch` pinhole) at copper U-bend braze joint on air-cooled condenser coil due to continuous fan vibration (`0.56` in/sec) and thermal cycling.
action_taken: Performed electronic leak check, located micro-leak at condenser coil U-bend, recovered remaining charge, silver brazed repair (`Spec-139`), evacuated to 350 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-410A (`15 lbs`).

symptom_description: Chiller controller displaying erratic leaving chilled water temperature (`reading jumps rapidly between 102°C and -15°C`). Unit locked out on freeze protection.
root_cause: Moisture ingress (`15%` RH) into immersion thermistor sensor probe pocket/well caused internal short (`0.28 Mega-ohms` resistance) across NTC thermistor element.
action_taken: Replaced leaving chilled water NTC thermistor probe (`Spec-480`), applied thermal paste (`Spec-487`) inside sensor well, and calibrated sensor offset in controller menu.
parts_used: NTC Immersion Thermistor Sensor Probe, Thermal Conductive Paste

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `19` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly (`28%` open).
root_cause: Vibration chafing (`0.22 inch` insulation worn) of sensor shielded wiring harness against chiller steel frame caused intermittent ground fault on sensor loop.
action_taken: Replaced defective discharge temperature thermistor (`P/N 6216-B`), repaired chafed sensor wiring harness with heat shrink, and cleared controller lockout (`26 Hz`).
parts_used: High Temperature Thermistor Probe, Heat Shrink Tubing Kit
